LA OPORTUNIDAD

Buscamos un/a Data Analyst para incorporarse a la comunidad de Data de Sngular y participar en proyectos de analítica avanzada, Business Intelligence y explotación del dato para clientes de diferentes sectores.


¿QUÉ HARÁS EN TU DÍA A DÍA?

Serás responsable de transformar datos complejos en conocimiento útil para el negocio, diseñando modelos analíticos, dashboards y métricas que permitan comprender mejor el rendimiento de productos, procesos y operaciones.


Trabajarás estrechamente con equipos de negocio, Data Engineering y Data Science para garantizar la calidad de la información y facilitar la toma de decisiones basada en datos.


  • Analizar grandes volúmenes de datos para identificar tendencias, patrones y oportunidades de mejora.
  • Diseñar y desarrollar dashboards, informes y visualizaciones orientadas a negocio.
  • Definir y construir KPIs, métricas y modelos semánticos para diferentes áreas de la organización.
  • Trabajar con equipos de negocio para comprender necesidades analíticas y traducirlas en soluciones de datos.
  • Realizar análisis exploratorios y estudios ad hoc para apoyar la toma de decisiones.
  • Diseñar consultas optimizadas sobre entornos de datos de gran volumen.
  • Garantizar la calidad, consistencia y trazabilidad de la información utilizada en reporting y analítica.
  • Colaborar con equipos de Data Engineering en la definición y validación de modelos de datos.
  • Automatizar procesos de análisis y generación de información mediante herramientas y scripts.
  • Participar en iniciativas de gobierno del dato y mejora continua de la calidad de la información.


¿QUÉ ES NECESARIO PARA EL PUESTO?

  • Experiencia de al menos 4 años como Data Analyst.
  • Dominio avanzado de SQL para análisis y explotación de datos.
  • Experiencia en Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
  • Experiencia trabajando con BigQuery u otras plataformas analíticas cloud.
  • Conocimientos de Python aplicado a análisis, automatización y tratamiento de datos.
  • Experiencia desarrollando dashboards e informes con Looker, Power BI o herramientas equivalentes.
  • Experiencia diseñando modelos analíticos y definiendo KPIs de negocio.
  • Capacidad para traducir necesidades de negocio en soluciones analíticas.
  • Conocimiento de modelado de datos y estructuras analíticas.
  • Experiencia trabajando con grandes volúmenes de información.
  • Buenas habilidades de comunicación y capacidad para interactuar con perfiles técnicos y de negocio.
  • Mentalidad analítica y orientación a la toma de decisiones basada en datos.


Es valorable:

  • Conocimiento de LookML y modelado semántico en Looker.
  • Experiencia en procesos ETL/ELT y herramientas de transformación de datos.
  • Experiencia en sectores como Retail, eCommerce, Banca, Telecomunicaciones o Salud.
  • Inglés.



BENEFICIOS

🎓 Formación continua: presupuesto individual, certificaciones, acceso a Udemy, clases de idiomas y programas internos.

🏠 Flexibilidad total: horario flexible y posibilidad de trabajar desde nuestros hubs o desde las instalaciones del cliente, depende del proyecto

📅 Tiempo libre adicional: 22 días de vacaciones + tu cumpleaños + 2 días para eventos técnicos + 24 y 31 de diciembre no laborables.

🌞 Wellbeing Pack: apoyo para tu bienestar físico y mental.

💵 Retribución flexible y programas de incentivos.

🎉 Eventos y dinámicas de teambuilding.

🎁 Pack de bienvenida y elección de equipo (Windows / Mac).

🚀 Bonus adicionales por recomendación, charlas o artículos técnicos.


And last, but not least: ¡porque somos muy Sngulares!💙 Tenemos Encuentro Virtual todos los viernes, fiestas, espacios donde podrás expresarte, proponer cambios y ser partícipe de ellos.



🌱 Nuestro compromiso Sngular: Como equipo comprometido con la equidad de nuestro Plan de Igualdad, en SNGULAR impulsamos una cultura plural donde el talento no tiene etiquetas y cada persona cuenta con las mismas oportunidades. Trabajamos desde el respeto, la humildad y el compañerismo, convencidos/as de que la diversidad nos fortalece.

Title: Business Data Analyst
Description:
Kajenthi@RED Global – Look for a DATA BUSINESS ANALYST – Freelance – 6 months + - Europe – Full remote




Business Analyst – Supply Chain & Data Analytics

Start Date: ASAP

Location: Remote (Nearshore Europe)

Duration: Long-term opportunity

Interview Process: 2 stages (Internal + Client)




Role Overview

We are looking for a Business Analyst with Supply Chain expertise to bridge business requirements and data-driven solutions. You will work closely with stakeholders, SAP teams, and analytics engineers to deliver impactful dashboards and self-service reporting solutions.




Key Responsibilities

Gather and analyze business requirements from Supply Chain stakeholders.
Define business value, KPIs, and reporting needs.
Prioritize requirements and dashboard features based on business impact.
Collaborate with SAP Functional Consultants and Data Analysts to validate data availability and quality.
Design dashboard mock-ups and wireframes with a strong focus on user experience (UX/UI).
Support the development, testing, and deployment of analytics solutions.
Create test scenarios and coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
Produce clear documentation including user stories, functional specifications, and business requirements.




Required Skills & Experience

3–5+ years of experience as a Business Analyst in Supply Chain environments.
Strong SQL skills for data analysis and reporting.
Experience working with SAP S/4HANA, particularly MM and SD modules.
Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.
Experience translating business requirements into data visualization solutions and dashboard designs.
Strong documentation and requirements gathering capabilities.




If you’re interested by this Freelance role, could you please send me your CV at kchelliah@redglobal.com

Title: Business Intelligence Analyst
Description:
About the Role

We are looking for a BI Analyst to help transform business data into meaningful insights that support strategic and operational decision-making. You will work closely with business stakeholders and technical teams to analyze data, create reports, and identify opportunities for process improvement.




Responsibilitie

Gather and analyze business and reporting requirements.
Develop dashboards, reports, and visualizations to support business decisions.
Interpret data trends and provide actionable insights.
Collaborate with stakeholders to understand key business metrics and KPIs.
Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and quality across reporting solutions.
Support data-driven initiatives and continuous improvement efforts.




Requiremen

Experience as a BI Analyst, Data Analyst.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Experience with BI and reporting tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or similar.
Good knowledge of SQL and data analysis techniques.
Ability to communicate insights to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Experience working with large datasets and business reporting.




Nice to Have

Experience in enterprise environments.
Knowledge of data warehousing concepts.
Familiarity with Azure Data Services or other cloud-based analytics platforms.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
En Carrefour estamos transformando nuestros sistemas centrales para modernizar nuestra actividad principal, el comercio al por menor.




Si quieres ser parte de una empresa dinámica, dentro de un sector con gran potencial de desarrollo que te ofrecerá oportunidades de crecimiento profesional y personal, nos encantará tener la oportunidad de conocerte.




Buscamos un/una Data Analyst para nuestra dirección de seguros con el objetivo de análizar los datos de la compañía con eje cliente através de la minería de los datos a partir de distintas fuentes y sobre un entorno Big Data y con el objetivo de transformarlos en información accionable para la compañía y proveer a la Compañia de informes y visualizaciones de datos útiles para la toma de decisiones. Discriminar y separar los datos para ofrecer información relevante a sus clientes. Potenciar e impulsar nuevos planteamientos de análisis orientados al cliente con el objetivo de realizar aportaciones de valor a las Unidades de




La posición debe potenciar e impulsar nuevos planteamientos de análisis orientados al cliente con el objetivo de realizar aportaciones de valor a las Unidades de Negocio.




Entre sus funciones principales se encuentran:




-Tener una visión clara de negocio con el fin de ayudar a las unidades de negocio a mejorar su toma de decisiones con respecto al cliente.

- Ofrecer una visualización de los datos que permita su mejor entendimiento por sus clientes.

- Aportar análisis cuantitativos basados en el histórico de datos internos de los clientes para ofrecer previsiones de comportamiento del mismo a Negocio, con el objetivo de ajustar los esfuerzos comerciales a la tendencia del cliente Realizar aportes de valor a las unidades de negocio orientado a la mejora de las decisiones que se adopten.

- Análisis e interpretación de los resultados a partir de distintas técnicas avanzadas (regresiones, algoritmos matemáticos avanzados…) y de herramientas analíticas para detectar las causas raíz de problemas de áreas de negocio .







Nos encantaría conocerte si cuentas con:




-Titulación de Ingeniero Superior, Matemático o Estadístico.

-Experiencia de 2 años en puestos similares.

-Ingles nivel medio-alto.

-Bases Datos SQL y Data Mining.







¿Qué te ofrecemos?

Contrato indefinido

Salario competitivo (fijo + variable)

Descuento del 8% para ti y para 6 personas más en nuestras tiendas

Programas que se preocupan por tu bienestar:

Carrefour Life (actividades y eventos deportivos, descuentos y ventajas exclusivas)

Carrefour Flexible (retribución flexible para seguro médico, guarderías, transporte…)

Formación continua

Desarrollo profesional




Valoraremos todas las candidaturas interesadas y si eres la persona seleccionada para avanzar en el proceso, nos pondremos en contacto contigo para darte más detalles del puesto y conocer tu perfil.




En Carrefour apostamos por un espacio de trabajo idóneo para que cualquier persona con independencia de su género, orientación sexual, identidad y/o expresión de género, creencias, ideologías, origen, capacidades, entre otras, pueda desplegar todo su potencial.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Rejoignez ENGIE et embarquez pour la plus importante aventure du siècle !

Si, comme nous, vous avez une vision optimiste de la transition énergétique pour les Hommes et la planète et que

vous souhaitez avoir un impact significatif sur notre monde, alors ne cherchez plus, votre place est parmi nous !




Nous sommes convaincus que la transition énergétique est pleine d'opportunités, nous devons donc agir maintenant

pour construire le monde zéro-carbone de demain, afin d’offrir un futur désirable pour tous.




Chez ENGIE, nous ne nous contentons pas de parler du changement,

nous le mettons en œuvre !




Rejoignez-nous et agissons pour un futur

désirable pour tous.







Qui sommes-nous ?

ENGIE Vianeo est la marque du groupe ENGIE dédiée au développement de la mobilité électrique. Elle conçoit, finance et opère des réseaux de recharge ouverts au public afin d’accompagner la transition vers une mobilité décarbonée.

Portée par les valeurs d’engagement, de transparence et de simplicité, ENGIE Vianeo s’appuie sur l’expertise du Groupe pour proposer des solutions innovantes à destination des collectivités, des entreprises et des acteurs du transport. Son ambition : permettre à tous de se déplacer durablement en réduisant les émissions de CO₂ et de particules fines.

Dans un contexte de forte croissance et de structuration des activités data, nous renforçons notre Direction Stratégie.




Rattaché(e) au Pôle Analyse Métier, vous rejoignez une équipe transverse de business analysts et data analysts, au cœur de la création de valeur d’ENGIE Vianeo.

Vous jouez un rôle clé dans la modélisation des offres, la prévision des volumes d’énergie et la valorisation des données liées aux infrastructures de recharge, en lien étroit avec les enjeux de développement du marché de la mobilité électrique (légère et lourde) en Europe.




Vos missions

Modélisation & prévision
Développer, améliorer et industrialiser des modèles analytiques et prédictifs (machine learning, modélisation avancée)
Fiabiliser les prévisions de volumes d’énergie délivrés sur nos stations de recharge
Data & innovation
Identifier et intégrer des sources de données externes pertinentes
Benchmarker les approches existantes et proposer des solutions innovantes au service des besoins métiers
Production & pilotage
Produire et garantir la robustesse des prévisions utilisées par les équipes Business Development
Contribuer à la prise de décision stratégique grâce à des analyses à forte valeur ajoutée
Industrialisation & data product
Assurer un rôle de Product Owner data
Participer à l’industrialisation des modèles et outils (automatisation, qualité, documentation, reproductibilité)
Collaboration transverse
Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes Digital, Business Development, Energy Management, Finance, Performance, Sales, Marketing & Strategy
Aligner les analyses data avec les stratégies de développement et les objectifs de performance des actifs




Votre profil

Formation Bac+5 (école d’ingénieur, data science, statistique ou équivalent)
Expérience significative de 7 à 10 ans en data analyse, modélisation prédictive ou environnement data/conseil
Une connaissance du secteur de l’énergie ou des infrastructures est un plus




Compétences techniques :

Très bonne maîtrise de Python, SQL et Excel
Expérience sur Databricks ou environnement data similaire
Bonne compréhension des approches de modélisation statistique et machine learning




Compétences comportementales :

Forte capacité d’analyse et de synthèse
Rigueur et autonomie
Capacité à transformer des données complexes en insights actionnables
Esprit collaboratif et excellent relationnel
Agilité et appétence pour les environnements en transformation rapide




Localisation: Campus - La Garenne-Colombes (92)




Pourquoi nous rejoindre ?

Un acteur majeur de la transition énergétique
Un environnement dynamique en pleine croissance
Des interactions riches avec des équipes pluridisciplinaires
Une entreprise engagée dans le développement de ses collaborateurs




Chez ENGIE, chaque talent a un rôle à jouer pour accélérer la transition énergétique. Faites la différence et venez vivre une expérience professionnelle épanouissante, relevez des défis passionnants et construisez le parcours qui vous ressemble.




Rejoignez‑nous et embarquez pour l’aventure de notre siècle !

ENGIE s'engage à promouvoir l'égalité des chances en matière d'emploi. Nous favorisons activement un environnement inclusif qui non seulement reconnaît mais valorise la diversité. Notre objectif est que tous les employés ressentent un véritable sentiment d'appartenance. Nous nous engageons à leur fournir un environnement de travail sûr et inclusif où ils se sentent encouragés à s'épanouir et à exceller.




Processus de recrutement en 3 étapes :

Échange téléphonique avec un RH
Entretien physique avec le manager opérationnel et le RH
Prise de décision

Processus de recrutement en 3 étapes :

  1. Échange téléphonique avec un RH
  2. Entretien physique avec le manager opérationnel et le RH
  3. Prise de décision

Qui sommes-nous ?

Althéa est un cabinet de conseil spécialisé dans la transformation des fonctions RH, SIRH et Finance. Dans le cadre du développement de notre activité d'externalisation de la gestion de la maladie, nous renforçons nos équipes et recherchons un(e) Data Analyst pour accompagner notre croissance et contribuer à l'amélioration continue de nos services.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
HTML:
A SIBS existe para tornar mais simples o que antes era complicado. Por isso, hoje, quando pensamos numa transação financeira, ponderamos sempre algo que pode ser feito com o simples premir de um botão ou com a passagem de um cartão.

Com mais de quatro décadas de existência e uma história de sucesso impulsionada pela inovação tecnológica e pela competitividade, somos uma referência internacional e um dos maiores processadores de pagamentos eletrónicos na Europa e em África. Entre as marcas mais conhecidas destacamos o MULTIBANCO, MB NET e MB WAY. E para continuar a inovar ano após ano, o Grupo SIBS estuda e desenvolve novas soluções que tornam a vida ainda mais simples para todos nós, particulares e empresas. Procuramos constantemente profissionais que assumam este compromisso e tenham capacidade para trabalhar em ambientes exigentes, desafiantes e tecnologicamente inovadores.

Com o objetivo de reforçar a atual Equipa da Núcleo de Business do Departamento Data and Advance Analytics, estamos a recrutar um Senior Data Analyst, com o seguinte Perfil:

  • Licenciatura em Informática, Matemática, Economia, Gestão de Informação ou similar;
  • Experiência profissional mínima de 5 anos na função de analista de dados;
  • Experiência mínima de 3 anos na utilização do Power BI;
  • Elevada capacidade analítica e atenção ao detalhe;
  • Proatividade e autonomia no desempenho das funções;
  • Forte orientação para resultados e foco no cliente;
  • Proficiência em modelação de dados dimensional;
  • Experiência consolidada na utilização do Power BI;
  • Domínio da linguagem DAX;
  • Conhecimentos técnicos em Databricks;
  • Conhecimento do negócio na área financeira, nomeadamente, no processamento de pagamentos;
  • Experiência comprovada na otimização de modelos de dados com elevados volumes de informação, assegurando um desempenho eficiente.


Função:

  • Colaborar estreitamente com as equipas de negócio, com o objetivo de compreender as suas necessidades de dados e assegurar que as análises produzidas estejam alinhadas com os objetivos estratégicos definidos;
  • Desenvolver datasets, dashboards e relatórios de forma interativa, recorrendo ao Power BI, de modo a responder eficazmente às necessidades de gestão das diferentes áreas de negócio;
  • Assegurar a manutenção e atualização regular de relatórios periódicos, garantindo a integridade, rigor e atualidade dos dados apresentados;
  • Elaborar e manter documentação detalhada relativa aos processos de desenvolvimento de relatórios e dashboards.


Benefícios:

  • Oportunidade de desenvolver projetos inovadores e de impacto direto na sociedade, numa empresa em crescimento e que aposta na inovação tecnológica há mais de 40 anos;
  • Acesso a um conjunto de benefícios atrativos: Subsídio de Alimentação superior aos valores médios de mercado; Pacote de Seguros; Pacote de Comunicações Móveis; Acesso a protocolos com diversos parceiros, entre outros;
  • Perspectivas de desenvolvimento e crescimento profissional;
  • Excelente ambiente de trabalho.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Company Description

Inetum is a global leader in IT services, dedicated to delivering innovative solutions to our clients. We are committed to fostering a dynamic and inclusive work environment that values diversity, where creativity and collaboration can thrive. We are present in 19 countries and have more than 28,000 employees worldwide.

If you are looking for a dynamic, innovative, and technology-driven company, Inetum is the place for you! Come be part of Inetum!

Job Description


Identify business problems and propose data-driven solutions to support decision-making and growth
Retrieve, clean, prepare, and analyze complex datasets from multiple sources
Design and implement analyses using statistical methods and data models
Develop reports, dashboards, and visualizations following best practices (Tableau, Power BI)
Build automated tools and solutions to deliver recurring insights efficiently
Contribute to data feed industrialization, ETL pipelines, and data warehousing processes
Translate business requirements into technical specifications for the development team
Communicate complex analytical results clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
Collaborate closely with traders, sales teams, business sponsors, and technical teams


Qualifications


Academic background in Engineering, Economics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field
Professional experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau and/or Power BI
Professional experience in data analysis using programming languages, preferably Python (Pandas)
Strong ability to analyze, synthesize, and simplify complex information
Knowledge of descriptive statistics and hypothesis testing is a plus
Familiarity with Big Data technologies such as PySpark, Presto, and Airflow is a plus
Knowledge of Power Query and DAX is a plus
Fluent in English

Title: Data Analyst (Product)
Description:
About Revolut




People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth, 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.




About the role




Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Analysts and Scientists work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering smart, scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for a talented Data Analyst to dig into our complex databases, look for root causes of a problem, design your own solutions, and write your own code to implement them. We aim for you to never stop learning, picking up new skills and delivering value along the way.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.




What you'll be doing




Understanding our business and its processes through our data
Applying this understanding and knowledge of data to help product and service teams
Designing key metrics to measure different aspects of the business
Creating and maintaining new aggregated views and tables to simplify data querying
Maintaining and creating new dashboards to track metrics and visualise insights
Promoting data literacy across the company, organising and holding workshops




What you'll need




Previous experience in an analytical role creating impactful solutions
A background/education in a quantitative discipline
3+ years of experience with SQL
Great skills with Python or other programming languages
Evidence of solid mathematical and statistics knowledge







Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.




Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.

• Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.

• Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.

We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

The ideal candidate will use their passion for big data and analytics to provide insights to the business covering a range of topics. They will be responsible for conducting both recurring and ad hoc analysis for business users.

About Revolut


People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth, 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.


About the role


Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Analysts and Scientists work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering smart, scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for a talented Data Analyst to dig into our complex databases, look for root causes of a problem, design your own solutions, and write your own code to implement them. We aim for you to never stop learning, picking up new skills and delivering value along the way.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.


What you'll be doing


  • Understanding our business and its processes through our data
  • Applying this understanding and knowledge of data to help product and service teams
  • Designing key metrics to measure different aspects of the business
  • Creating and maintaining new aggregated views and tables to simplify data querying
  • Maintaining and creating new dashboards to track metrics and visualise insights
  • Promoting data literacy across the company, organising and holding workshops


What you'll need


  • Previous experience in an analytical role creating impactful solutions
  • A background/education in a quantitative discipline
  • 3+ years of experience with SQL
  • Great skills with Python or other programming languages
  • Evidence of solid mathematical and statistics knowledge



Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.


Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.

• Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.

• Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.

We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

The ideal candidate will use their passion for big data and analytics to provide insights to the business covering a range of topics. They will be responsible for conducting both recurring and ad hoc analysis for business users.

Title: Data Analyst Junior
Description:
Joining Unlimitail means becoming part of the Retail Media revolution — the marketing lever that is transforming advertising by leveraging data and the digital and physical environments of retailers.




With the ambition to become a leader in Europe and Latin America, Unlimitail helps brands deploy powerful Retail Media strategies and supports retailers in developing their own offers through cutting-edge proprietary technology.




At Unlimitail, you’ll be joining a fast-growing company at the crossroads of data, technological innovation, and digital marketing — reinventing the way brands and retailers connect with consumers.




Role Overview :




Within the Analytics team, your mission will be to participate in the development of Unlimitail’s analytics capabilities. Your environment will be millions of transactional data coming from major retailers on the market to analyze and improve the performance of online and offline marketing campaigns.




As we work with both retailers (providing media inventory) and brands (buying media inventory), you will have the opportunity to gain a deep understanding of the retail media ecosystem.




Your Mission :




You will work with different teams (Ad Operations, Marketing, Sales) in different countries on a wide variety of topics:

Perform ecommerce campaigns analysis to provide detailed insights
Conduct end-to-end ad hoc analysis to help retailers best monetize their inventory
Participate in the design and maintenance of databases, using SQL to store and manage data efficiently
Work on automating data analysis and data visualization capabilities
Work on Unlimitail’s customer lifetime value calculation capability
Participate in the development of new, cutting-edge capabilities to create the best retail media products




What we’re looking for :




Master's degree in Data Analysis, business analytics, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related field.
First experience in data analysis
Data Analysis: Proven ability to analyze large datasets, identify trends, and extract actionable insights through the use of strong SQL skills for querying and data extraction.
Programming Languages: Python and SQL mandatory, any other is a plus
Data Visualization: previous experience in creating interactive and insightful visualizations, using tools like Looker is mandatory
Knowledge of GCP environment is a plus
Problem-solving: Adept in approaching analytical problems and proposing effective solutions.
Good communication skills in English. Another language (Spanish, Portuguese) is a plus.
Strong team player with the ability to collaborate effectively




Salary range: €40k - €45k (commensurate with profile)




What’s in it for you :




Work in a fast-paced, international, and innovative environment, at the intersection of data, retail, and media – one of the fastest-growing spaces in digital
A strategic role in a high-growth team with autonomy and impact
A dynamic, supportive environment with smart people and bold ambitions
Office located in the heart of Paris (Sentier district)
A flexible remote work policy of 2 days/week
90% reimbursement of public transportation
10€/day Swile card for each working day, we'll cover 60% of the cost




Ready to make a big impact? Apply now and be part of our innovative journey!

Unlimitail is committed to fostering a diverse workforce and strongly encourages applications from underrepresented groups. We are committed to equality of opportunity and welcome applications from individuals, regardless of their background.

If you have any reasonable adjustment needs arising from a disability or medical condition to fully participate in the recruitment process, please discuss this with the recruiter who contacts you.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: Data Analyst

Seniority: +4 years

Location : Lisbon/Porto




Skills Needed?




Degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, or related fields.
Proven experience in data analysis and Power BI.
Proficiency in SQL and other data manipulation tools.
Ability to create interactive dashboards and reports in Power BI.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Good communication skills to present insights clearly and effectively.
Ability to work independently and in a team.
The candidate has to be in Portugal.







Why should you become part of our family?




You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!




Who are we?

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto, Leiria and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.We believe transparency, trust and integrity are the pillars of any business and relationship and that is what we promise our clients and employees who join our company KCS IT.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Do you want to be a part of the world’s leading jewelry company while putting your experience in technology into use? If yes, then we have an exciting opportunity for you! You will be part of Pandora Marketing Analytics teams and work in an international organisation of can-do spirited, passionate, and performance-driven people. We value flexibility and informal working, where you are trusted to deliver and to focus on outcomes and business value.




Responsibilities




· Formulate and define scope and objectives based on a thorough understanding of business needs and business processes.

· Understand the business implications of advanced analytics solutions and assist in defining the solutions to support any future business requirements.

· Execute advanced analytics projects and provide ad hoc analyses to the business as needed.

· Design, drive, and implement analytics tools and ad hoc analyses. Engage with users to understand & meet their analytics requirements.

· Ensure timely delivery of reports/analysis and proactively communicate delays/issues.

· Ensure data accuracy in each deliverable.

· Provide support for business continuity of deliverables/analyses, and drive the usage and adoption of our new self-service analytical tool.




Skills Required

· 7+ years of relevant experience

· Proficiency in data visualizations and dashboards.

· Effective SQL skills.

· Strong analytical skills.

· Proficiency in querying and manipulating complex raw datasets for analysis.

· Experience explaining technical concepts to varied audiences and experience translating business objectives into actionable analyses, with a focus on design thinking and user centric design

· Sound knowledge & experience in business communication/ presentation skills and reporting

· Proven stakeholder management skills

· BS Degree in Business, Economics, Statistics, Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, Information Technology, Finance or similar.

· Passion for data science & AI, & having Python or Pyspark skills is a plus

· Fluent English both spoken and written

Engagement Model: Direct Independent Contractor (Please read carefully)

This is an independent contractor opportunity based on a direct contractual relationship between Zoolatech and the individual service provider.

To facilitate this direct partnership, we engage with professionals who are registered and operate as a sole proprietorship, private entrepreneur, or an equivalent self-employment status in your country.

Please note, our model does not accommodate contracts through third-party intermediaries such as agencies, incubators, or umbrella companies. The essential requirement is your ability to enter into a service agreement and invoice Zoolatech directly. This is not an offer of direct employment

Please note that only candidates whose profiles closely match our requirements will be contacted.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Decskill was founded in 2014 as an IT Consulting Company and their main mission is to delivery value through the knowledge. We enable companies to meet the chalenges of digital world by providing our clients with business models that ensure technological capacity, flexibility and agility. We are more than 500 consultants with offices in Lisbon, Porto and Madrid.




DECSKILL operates in 3 main areas:

• DECSKILL TALENT: through which we provide our clients with an extension to their IT teams;

• DECSKILL BOOST: through which we provide our client with software development models to increase capacity and optimize Time-to-Market, where we create and manage teams that deliver according to their needs, at the desired speed;

• DECSKILL CONNECT: through which we provide our client with consulting services, as well as the implementation and management of information technology infrastructures.




Our practice results in the creation of value for our customers, either by delivering qualified and value-added services, or through highly qualified and motivated professionals, as well as technology solutions that allow us to operate and transform the business of our customers.




We are looking for a DATA ANALYST.




Responsabilities:

As a Data Analyst, you will play a vital role in our team. Working directly with one or more of the bank's business areas, you will provide valuable insights to drive business growth, understading their needs, proposing and implementing data-driven solutions (analysis, visualization and automation). You will exercise a lot of problem identification and problem solving skills.
You will have the opportunity to take ownership of business essential analytical projects that involve retrieving, preparing and analysing complex datasets using data/statistical models and best practices in data visualization for the reporting creation, with the goal to produce insights and automated tools that will guide strategic solutions
You will move between technical and non-technical areas and should be able to communicate well with different types of professionals. It is very important to be able to clearly and concisely understand stekeholders’ needs and translate these to our technical team, as well as present the results of complex analysis to our stakeholders.




Requierments:

Academic background in Engineering, Economics, Computing, Mathematics, Statistics or related fields
Professional experience in any data visualization tool such as Tableau or Power BI
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas)
Professional experience in any data visualization tool such as Tableau or Power BI
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas)
Ability to analysze, synthetize and simplify.
Knowledge of descriptive statistics and hypothesis testing is a plus.
Knowledge in Big Data technology such as Pyspark, Presto and Airflow is a plus
Knowledge of Power Query and DAX is a plus




If you’re interested in this job please send your CV in English to carolina.mustra@decskill.com with reference “CM/Data Analyst".




Decskill is committed to equality and non-discrimination with all our talents. We recruit and promote talent, based on diversity and inclusion, regardless of age, gender, ethnicity, race, nationality or any other form of discrimination incompatible with the dignity of the human being.

Job Description

Job Description:

The Data Analyst is responsible for collecting, cleaning, analyzing, and interpreting data to provide actionable insights for business decisions. The role involves creating and managing data pipelines using Airflow for data extraction, processing, and loading, ensuring their maintenance, monitoring, and stability. The analyst will work closely with end-users and other teams to provide accessible and reliable data

Main Tasks


Responsible for creating data pipelines in Airflow for data extracting, processing and loading
Responsible for code and query optimization
Responsible for generating insights and identify trends, anomalies or opportunities to improve users experience and anticipate their daily tasks
Responsible for delivering data in useful and appealing ways to users
Responsible for understanding business change and requirement needs, assess the impact and the cost.


Qualifications

Technical Skills:


Python
Experience in creating APIs in Python
PySpark
SQL, Oracle Data Base
Experience with Data Warehouses
Apache Airflow - Experience in pipeline development
Git
Agile methodologies


Language Skills


English – Practice


Soft Skills


Good communication skills
Strong analytical abilities, able to have the right synthesis and all possible details at same timee required soft skills
Adaptability skills
Team spirit
Client Focus

Title: Data Analyst
HTML:
Who we are

Neotalent Conclusion is one of the leading Iberian specialists providing services in Information Technology and Engineering services. As part of the Netherlands-based organization Conclusion, which has an ecosystem of over 25 companies and 3,600 employees, we are focused on increasing the technological capacity of our clients and the digital transformation of their application ecosystems.

We are talent specialists, attracting the best people and combining them with the needs of the most ambitious projects, at the right time. Our success comes from our investments in innovation, our focus on results, and, above all, the guarantee that our people will have happy and rewarding careers.

With over 25 years of solid experience, Neotalent Conclusion has established its presence in key locations, including Lisbon, Porto, and Madrid. The company currently has more than 950 professionals in the different areas in which it operates.


Neotalent, the responsive people.


Find out more about us at www.neotalentconclusion.com.


Role Overview

We are looking for a Data Analyst to integrate our teams and support data-driven decision-making across the organisation. In this role, you will focus on descriptive and diagnostic analytics, transforming complex data into meaningful insights that help stakeholders understand where the business has been.


What you will do

  • Gather, analyse, and translate business requirements into effective data reporting and analytical solutions;
  • Design and support data solutions such as data warehouses, data marts, dashboards, and reporting systems;
  • Develop and maintain data models, reports, and interactive visualisations;
  • Collaborate closely with IT and data teams to ensure accurate data integration, quality, and governance;
  • Support stakeholders in interpreting analytical results and turning insights into actionable business decisions.


What you are like

  • Proficient in SQL for data querying, analysis, and performance optimisation;
  • Experienced with data visualisation tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or similar technologies;
  • Proficient in statistical analysis and data manipulation using tools such as Python (e.g. pandas) or R;
  • Comfortable working with complex data sets, identifying patterns, trends, and root causes;
  • Skilled in data cleansing, preparation, and validation techniques;
  • English is fluent.


Why join us

  • Work on challenging projects for big clients
  • Learn more about emerging technologies
  • Possibility of working remotely
  • Design your career plan
  • Access to continuous training and certifications
  • Evolve through our internal mobility programme
  • … and much more!

Title: Data Analyst- Power BI
Description:
B2B Freelance Opportunity

Onsite, Brussels

Duration: 6 months

Starts : ASAP

NOTE: French OR Dutch mandatory

EU Citizens and Belgium Work Permit Candidates are Eligible




Service description

As our Power BI Expert you will be the go-to person to design, automate, optimise and maintain the Power BI reporting landscape that supports these initiatives — making sure stakeholders, from executives to operational teams, get the right insights at the right time, in a way they can trust and act upon.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1.KPI reporting & automation

Build and automate end-to-end KPI reporting for Group Controlling stakeholder
Translate business questions into clear, decision-ready dashboards aligned with our performance framework




2.Maintenance & continuous improvement of existing dashboards

Support the maintenance of the existing Group Controlling Power BI portfolio
Monitor adoption and usage (e.g. via Power BI Usage Metrics) and proactively propose improvements based on real user behaviour.




3.Semantic models, visualisation & data quality

Rationalise our Power BI semantic models — consolidate overlapping datasets, clarify ownership, document relationships and improve refresh performance.
Optimise visualisations: simplify, standardise and align them with our design a




Requirements:

Solid hands-on experience with Power BI Desktop (semantic models, DAX, Power Query, workspaces, apps, dataset refreshes, gateways)
Proven experience designing, automating and maintaining KPI dashboards in a corporate or group-wide context, ideally in Controlling, Finance or IT governance
Strong skills in data modelling, semantic model optimisation and data cleaning (performance tuning, naming conventions, documentation).
Ability to work autonomously: identify needs, propose solutions for both data structure and visualisation, and drive them to delivery.
Excellent communication skills, comfortable talking to both business stakeholders (controllers, managers, executives) and IT/Data engineers;
Fluent in English; a good working knowledge of French and/or Dutch is a strong asset, German is a plus given our 50Hertz collaboration.

Title: Data Analyst (Product)
Description:
About Revolut

People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 75+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.

About The Role

Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Analysts and Scientists ‌work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering smart, scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for a talented Data Analyst to dig into our complex databases, look for root causes of a problem, design your own solutions, and write your own code to implement them. We aim for you to never stop learning, picking up new skills and delivering value along the way.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.

What You’ll Be Doing


Understanding our business and its processes through our data
Applying this understanding and knowledge of data to help product and service teams
Designing key metrics to measure different aspects of the business
Creating and maintaining new aggregated views and tables to simplify data querying
Maintaining and creating new dashboards to track metrics and visualise insights
Promoting data literacy across the company, organising and holding workshops


What You'll Need


Previous experience in an analytical role, creating impactful solutions
A background/education in a quantitative discipline
5+ years of experience with SQL
Great skills with Python or other programming languages
Evidence of solid mathematical and statistics knowledge


Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.

Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.


Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.
Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.


We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Want to know how a leading workplace experience and facility management company is powered by technology?

At ISS Tech Team, we create smarter workplace experiences through technology. Our Global Technology Solutions team builds digital solutions, from sensors and IoT devices to data, analytics and AI-driven capabilities, that support our ISS A/S operations across Cleaning, Workplace, Food and Technical Services.

With tech hubs in Copenhagen, Warsaw, and Porto, and teams collaborating across more than 30 countries, our ISS Tech team develops our digital solutions that have a real impact on both our customers and our people.




Location: Porto, Portugal

Work regime: Hybrid







What will you do as Data Analyst:

Provide day‑to‑day operational support for quarterly carbon data collection and input validation.
Maintain strong data‑quality control at the input and pre‑processing stage to ensure smooth downstream reporting by the country decarb managers.
Support the implementation of standardised validation checks, anomaly detection, and country follow‑ups.
Assist in preparing clean, validated datasets for further analysis and reporting.
Contribute to audit‑readiness by organising documentation and evidence.




Key qualifications:

Must have:

Master’s Degree in Data or Environmental Science
More than 3 years’ experience in data handling, environmental data, or similar analytical support roles.
Strong skills in Excel, Power BI (basic visuals, data prep), and SQL (simple queries, data extraction).
Experience with data cleaning, validation, and structured data workflows.
English proficiency, both written and spoken.




Nice have:

Familiarity with emissions data or GHG concepts is an advantage but not required.
Comfortable in repetitive, detail-oriented validation work.




Personal skills:

Strong attention to detail and careful execution.
Strong communication and reliability under time pressure.




What ISS Offers You:

We focus on creating an environment where you can grow and perform at your best:

Permanent contract.
Private health insurance.
22 days of annual leave + 3 additional company days to recharge.
Flexible working hours and a hybrid model that supports balance and collaboration.
Continuous learning opportunities (technical and behavioural development) to support your growth.
Modern, well-equipped office in the heart of Porto.
Free parking for your convenience.
Access to ISS Tech Communities to connect, learn and share knowledge.
Free access to the company gym to support your wellbeing.
Snacks and drinks available at the office.




Why ISS

At ISS, we are more than just a service provider of cleaning, food, workplace and technical services, we are a partner in our customers’ success. By creating exceptional service moments and transforming workplaces into spaces where employees feel valued, engaged and productive, we enhance productivity and help our customers to attract talent and grow their businesses. This begins with our own people through training, career development, and a supportive culture – empowering them to deliver outstanding service. We know that when our people thrive, they create spaces where our customers’ employees and businesses thrive too.




ISS is a Place to Be You.

Be who you are. Become what you want. Be part of something bigger.

Become more. Become ISS.




ISS seeks to BE a place of belonging and CREATE places where every person is welcomed, embraced, and valued for exactly who they are. Places where people feel safe, respected, represented, and supported as their authentic selves.

#LI-Hybrid

Title: Junior Analytics Engineer
Place: Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark
Description:
Do you have a passion for Sports & Outdoor?

Do you thrive at the intersection of data, automation, and AI?

Do you love finding ways to make complex processes simpler through data?

Apply now and become part of our great team at DANISH ENDURANCE®!

We are looking for a talented and ambitious Junior Analytics Engineer to help drive our automation and AI journey - and to contribute to the continuous development and growth of our brand of endurance and outdoor gear.

Who is DANISH ENDURANCE®?

DANISH ENDURANCE® is a global endurance & outdoor brand within e-commerce. With a focus on Danish design and sustainable manufacturing in Europe and Asia, we are a young high-growth company, with a flat structure and a friendly, dynamic working environment. We are a truly international team consisting of 70 professionals with 25 different nationalities based in Copenhagen at Holmen and Gramrode near Horsens.

We have a scalable and unique business model, our ambitions are rocket-high, and we strongly believe that everything is possible. That is why we need you!

What can you expect from the job?

As Our Junior Analytics Engineer, You Will


Build and maintain ELT pipelines, and model the ingested data to business needs in dbt
Drive process optimization and automation initiatives
Help take automations and agentic workflows into production - and grow into the architecture and hosting behind them

Title: Data Analyst (H/F)
Description:
Notre client est une maison française, reconnue pour ses produits iconiques dans l'univers des arts de la table, distribués en France et à l'international. Dans le cadre de sa transformation digitale, l'entreprise structure un socle décisionnel ambitieux : architecture BI sur Oracle, restitution Power BI, et intégration d'assistants IA dans les usages métiers.

POSTE / MISSIONS

Rattaché(e) à La Direction Financière Et Sous L'encadrement Fonctionnel Du Consultant BI Référent Du Projet Data, Vous Venez Renforcer L'exécution Et La Continuité Interne Sur Les Sujets Suivants


SQL & préparation des données : rédiger et optimiser des requêtes et vues sur la base décisionnelle (jointures, agrégations, fenêtrage)
Power BI : développer et maintenir les rapports et tableaux de bord (modèle sémantique, mesures DAX, Power Pivot)
Qualité des données : contrôles de cohérence, détection et documentation des anomalies, suivi des actions correctives
Automatisation : mettre en place des flux Power Automate (diffusion de rapports, alertes, rafraîchissements)
Documentation & support : documenter les modèles, dictionnaires de données et assurer le support de premier niveau
Contribution IA : participer à l'intégration d'assistants IA dans les usages data : skills métiers, connecteurs MCP, structuration du contexte


Processus : entretien de découverte → évaluation technique (SQL, Power BI, cas pratique) → entretien final avec le référent BI et la direction.

PROFIL RECHERCHÉ

Formation Bac+4 à Bac+5 spécialité data, statistiques ou équivalent.

Première expérience en temps plein sur un sujet data / BI demandée.

Compétences Requises


SQL opérationnel : jointures, agrégations, sous-requêtes, vues
Un outil de dataviz maîtrisé : Power BI privilégié
Bases de modélisation décisionnelle (faits / dimensions, granularité)
Rigueur, curiosité, capacité à documenter et restituer clairement


Un Plus


Oracle PL/SQL, procédures stockées, scheduler
Power Pivot, DAX, Power Automate
Pratique d'un assistant IA (Claude, ChatGPT) en contexte professionnel

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Data Engineer based in Spain.

This role focuses on rebuilding trust in a complex, regulated data environment where existing pipelines are not yet reliable, reproducible, or fully validated. You will be responsible for transforming a newly centralized data lake into a robust, analytics-ready foundation that supports downstream data science and risk modelling use cases. Working within a regulated credit and lending context, you will design and enforce strong data quality, lineage, and governance standards across multiple source systems. The role requires deep hands-on engineering across AWS, Spark, and modern data tooling, with a strong emphasis on correctness, auditability, and reproducibility. You will collaborate closely with data science and engineering stakeholders to define harmonized data models and prepare feature-ready datasets. This is a high-impact foundational role where your work directly enables reliable decision-making in a financial risk environment.

Accountabilities


Rebuild and validate data pipelines to ensure full reproducibility of reporting and descriptive statistics across all datasets
Profile, reconcile, and harmonize heterogeneous source schemas across multiple business entities into a unified data model
Design and implement dbt-based data models (staging, intermediate, and marts) with strong testing and validation layers
Develop and maintain data quality frameworks using tools such as Great Expectations and dbt tests to enforce reliability
Build and implement entity resolution and record linkage logic across fragmented customer and account datasets
Ensure robust anonymization and pseudonymization processes that meet regulatory and compliance requirements
Optimize large-scale Spark-based processing jobs, including partitioning strategies, file formats, and cost-efficient compute usage
Orchestrate production-grade pipelines using tools such as Airflow or AWS Step Functions
Deliver clean, documented, and feature-ready datasets for downstream data science and risk modelling teams
Create clear technical documentation and runbooks to support operational handover and long-term maintainability


Requirements


4+ years of professional experience in data engineering with strong exposure to large-scale AWS and Spark environments
Advanced proficiency in SQL and Python for data processing and transformation at scale
Strong experience with AWS data services including S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, EMR, and orchestration tools
Proven experience building and maintaining data models using dbt or similar frameworks
Hands-on experience with data quality, validation, and testing frameworks such as Great Expectations
Strong understanding of data governance, lineage, and reproducibility in production environments
Experience with entity resolution, deduplication, or record linkage across multiple data sources
Familiarity with anonymization and pseudonymization techniques in regulated environments
Experience working in regulated industries such as BFSI, healthcare, or government is highly valued
Ability to work independently or as a lead engineer within a small, fast-moving delivery team
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to document and explain complex systems clearly


Benefits


Competitive compensation package aligned with experience and impact
Remote-friendly working arrangements within Europe
Opportunity to work on a high-impact, regulated data transformation project
Exposure to modern AWS data architecture and large-scale Spark processing environments
Direct collaboration with data science and engineering leadership on meaningful analytics use cases
Strong autonomy in shaping data foundations and engineering standards
Opportunity to build robust, production-grade systems from an early-stage data estate
International, collaborative environment with distributed teams


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Data & AI Business Analyst
Description:
UBICACIÓN.- MAJADAHONDA - CR. POZUELO DE ALARCON, 50-1 Edif. 4

MISIÓN DEL PUESTO

Apoyar en la gestión operativa de los proyectos de Datos & IA realizando tareas operativas, el seguimiento de tareas, la preparación de materiales y el soporte en sesiones de trabajo. Colabora como punto de coordinación entre negocio, Data&AI, y los equipos técnicos (ingeniería, Data Science y arquitecturas), contribuyendo a asegurar la calidad de las entregas, el cumplimiento de plazos y una operación eficiente y ordenada.

FUNCIONES DEL PUESTO (FUNCIONES CLAVE)

Identificar y estructurar necesidades de negocio, participando en reuniones, entendiendo el contexto funcional y traduciendo los requerimientos a lenguaje analítico.

Gestionar de forma conjunta el ciclo completo de los proyectos Data & IA: planificación, priorización, seguimiento operativo, gestión de riesgos y control de entregables.

Coordinar equipos multidisciplinares asegurando alineamiento y fluidez operativa.

Servir de interlocutor operativo con Negocio, Tecnología, Oficina Data & IA y otros equipos implicados.

Apoyar a los responsables de área en la gestión del portfolio y la priorización basada en capacidad y valor.

Monitorizar KPIs operativos, carga de trabajo, y eficiencia de los procesos.

Seguimientos y análisis técnicos y operativos

FORMACION Y CONOCIMIENTOS REQUERIDOS

Formación universitaria en Economía, Ingeniería, Matemáticas, Sistemas de información o similar.

Conocimientos sólidos en gestión de proyectos (ágil e híbrida), toma de requisitos y diseño funcional.

Manejo de herramientas de tratamiento y análisis de datos (Excel, SQL, Python)

Capacidad para traducir impacto operativo y estratégico del dato.

Capacidad para evaluar la viabilidad técnica y operativa de las iniciativas.

Conocimientos básicos de herramientas BI

Fundamentos de KPIs, métricas, funnels, cohortes y análisis descriptivo.

Capacidad para estructurar información, entender reglas de negocio y convertirlas en métricas o requisitos analíticos.

Conocimiento funcional de procesos de negocio (clientes, comercial, canales, pricing, siniestros, operaciones…).

EXPERIENCIA PROFESIONAL REQUERIDA PARA EL PUESTO

Haber liderado o dirigido iniciativas estratégicas, operativas o metodológicas que hayan mejorado; eficiencia del área,calidad del dato, trazabilidad, reporting ejecutivo, modelo de coordinación. Experiencia mínima de 2 años

Experiencia mínima de 2 años en toma de requisitos, definición de casos de uso, análisis funcional y validación de entregables.

Trabajo en squads multidisciplinares bajo metodologías ágiles, durante un mínimo de 2 años

Title: Stagiaire Data Analyst Santé Non Rémunéré
HTML:
Notre startup recherche un(e) stagiaire Data Analyst Santé pour participer à des projets de recherche et d’innovation dans le domaine de la santé.


🔎 Vos missions :


* Analyser et structurer des données de santé ;

* Produire des analyses et des visualisations pertinentes ;

* Contribuer à la valorisation des données pour la recherche ;

* Participer au développement d’outils d’aide à la décision.


🎯 Profil recherché :


* Étudiant(e) en Data Science, Statistiques, Informatique, Santé publique ou domaine équivalent ;

* Maîtrise de Python, SQL, Excel ou outils similaires ;

* Curiosité, autonomie et rigueur ;

* Sensibilité aux enjeux de la recherche et de l’innovation en santé.


✨ Ce que nous offrons :


* Une immersion au cœur d’une startup en pleine construction ;

* Une participation directe à des projets innovants à fort impact ;

* L’opportunité de contribuer concrètement à l’avancement de la recherche en santé ;

* Une expérience enrichissante aux côtés d’une équipe engagée.


⚠️ Il s’agit d’un stage non rémunéré. Nous sommes conscients que cela ne conviendra pas à tous les profils, mais nous proposons une expérience formatrice avec une réelle contribution à des projets de recherche et d’innovation susceptibles d’avoir un impact concret sur la santé de demain.


📩 N’hésitez pas à nous contacter pour en savoir plus ou à partager cette publication autour de vous.


#Stage #DataAnalyst #Santé #Recherche #Innovation #Startup #HealthTech #DataScience #HealthData #Recrutement #Impact #StageSanté

Title: Asesor/a Técnico/a Comercial - GRANADA
Description:
¿Eres de los que no esperan a que las oportunidades lleguen, sino que salen a crearlas?

En Lumon buscamos personas con visión, energía imparable y ambición profesional. Como Asesor/a Comercial, serás la cara visible de nuestra marca en tu zona, llevando soluciones innovadoras directamente a los hogares y construyendo relaciones sólidas desde cero.

🎁 Lo que Lumon te ofrece


📄 Contrato indefinido + salario fijo.
💰 Comisiones sin límites; ¡tú decides lo que quieres ganar!
🚗 Coche de empresa + ⛽ tarjeta Solred para poder desplazarte por tu zona de trabajo.
🍽️ Tarjeta de dietas diarias para que repongas fuerza y puedas seguir siendo el más conocido/a en tu zona.
🕘 Jornada completa en horario comercial donde tendrás flexibilidad completa para estar en tu zona tanto en horario de mañana como en horario de tarde.
📱💻👕 Todas las herramientas necesarias para desempeñar tu trabajo: móvil, ordenador, maquetas, uniformidad, etc.
💎 LUMONFLEX: retribución flexible en seguro médico, abono transporte, cheque guardería y formación. Acceso a descuentos en multitud de establecimientos asociados a Lumon y beneficios exclusivos por ser parte de la familia: cursos gratuitos de idiomas, descuento en nuestro sistema de acristalamiento, hoteles, material informático y ¡mucho más!


🚀 Tu misión


🚪 Prospección activa: captar clientes particulares en edificios residenciales y acercarles nuestra propuesta de valor, a través de puerta fría, stands etc.
🛠 Asesoramiento personalizado: presentar soluciones técnicas en el propio hogar y realizar las primeras mediciones para presupuestos.
🔗 Representar Lumon con orgullo: actuar como embajador en tu zona, generar leads mediante referenciados y estrategias de venta creativas.
🔄 Seguimiento cercano: construir relaciones comerciales de confianza y transmitir conocimiento experto.


✅ Lo que buscamos en ti


📍 Residencia en Granada capital o alrededores
🗣️ Nivel de inglés valorable
